## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between Ramp and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and future plans.](https://fathom.video/share/QVt_86NVXXfhrrpKWJmyRQPh-QEEfUzP?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [22 published articles, more scheduled; team to update Airtable status when publishing](https://fathom.video/share/QVt_86NVXXfhrrpKWJmyRQPh-QEEfUzP?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [New article topics for October discussed; GrowthX to generate 10-15 ideas for two pillars](https://fathom.video/share/QVt_86NVXXfhrrpKWJmyRQPh-QEEfUzP?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
  - [AI-generated content performing well, with room for improvement; focus on verticalization efforts](https://fathom.video/share/QVt_86NVXXfhrrpKWJmyRQPh-QEEfUzP?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Potential for rapid scaling of content production, especially for per diem and business credit card topics](https://fathom.video/share/QVt_86NVXXfhrrpKWJmyRQPh-QEEfUzP?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)

## Topics

### Content Management and Workflow

  - [22 published articles, more scheduled and in draft](https://fathom.video/share/QVt_86NVXXfhrrpKWJmyRQPh-QEEfUzP?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [Team can update Airtable status (published/scheduled) independently](https://fathom.video/share/QVt_86NVXXfhrrpKWJmyRQPh-QEEfUzP?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [New approval field added for efficient topic selection](https://fathom.video/share/QVt_86NVXXfhrrpKWJmyRQPh-QEEfUzP?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [GrowthX to generate 10-15 ideas for two pillars based on provided keywords](https://fathom.video/share/QVt_86NVXXfhrrpKWJmyRQPh-QEEfUzP?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)

### Content Performance and Strategy

  - [AI-generated content showing impressions, some ranking well](https://fathom.video/share/QVt_86NVXXfhrrpKWJmyRQPh-QEEfUzP?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Performing better than previous programmatic efforts, but not yet matching expensive freelancer content](https://fathom.video/share/QVt_86NVXXfhrrpKWJmyRQPh-QEEfUzP?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
  - [Focus on verticalization (e.g., "best credit cards for dentists, restaurant owners")](https://fathom.video/share/QVt_86NVXXfhrrpKWJmyRQPh-QEEfUzP?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
  - [Potential to scale to 15-20 articles per week if aligned with Q4 strategy](https://fathom.video/share/QVt_86NVXXfhrrpKWJmyRQPh-QEEfUzP?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)

### Data Integration and Unique Content

  - [Ramp considering using spend data for unique content creation](https://fathom.video/share/QVt_86NVXXfhrrpKWJmyRQPh-QEEfUzP?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [Potential for programmatically generated spending trends across categories](https://fathom.video/share/QVt_86NVXXfhrrpKWJmyRQPh-QEEfUzP?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [Challenges with data sensitivity; exploring ways to safely access and utilize data](https://fathom.video/share/QVt_86NVXXfhrrpKWJmyRQPh-QEEfUzP?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)

### AI Content Generation Process

  - [Pulls data from top-ranking sources for credibility](https://fathom.video/share/QVt_86NVXXfhrrpKWJmyRQPh-QEEfUzP?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [Uses domain authority to determine source reliability](https://fathom.video/share/QVt_86NVXXfhrrpKWJmyRQPh-QEEfUzP?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Human review for final quality check](https://fathom.video/share/QVt_86NVXXfhrrpKWJmyRQPh-QEEfUzP?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Exploring advanced methods (e.g., podcast transcription) for more creative inputs](https://fathom.video/share/QVt_86NVXXfhrrpKWJmyRQPh-QEEfUzP?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)

### Future Content Opportunities

  - [Per diem content for 2,000+ US cities (population \>50k)](https://fathom.video/share/QVt_86NVXXfhrrpKWJmyRQPh-QEEfUzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Potential for 100 articles by end of week if project is greenlit](https://fathom.video/share/QVt_86NVXXfhrrpKWJmyRQPh-QEEfUzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
  - [Discussing creation of new section or tool for per diem content](https://fathom.video/share/QVt_86NVXXfhrrpKWJmyRQPh-QEEfUzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)

### Content Differentiation

  - [Ensuring uniqueness from previous projects (e.g., Home Base) through:](https://fathom.video/share/QVt_86NVXXfhrrpKWJmyRQPh-QEEfUzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
      - [Different company description, persona, voice, tone, product focus](https://fathom.video/share/QVt_86NVXXfhrrpKWJmyRQPh-QEEfUzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
      - [Unique CTAs and cross-linking strategies](https://fathom.video/share/QVt_86NVXXfhrrpKWJmyRQPh-QEEfUzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
      - [Updated AI workflows for diverse outputs](https://fathom.video/share/QVt_86NVXXfhrrpKWJmyRQPh-QEEfUzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### Cross-linking and Affiliate Strategies

  - [Exploring cross-linking opportunities with non-competing clients](https://fathom.video/share/QVt_86NVXXfhrrpKWJmyRQPh-QEEfUzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
  - [Considering affiliate widget placement for enhanced backlinking](https://fathom.video/share/QVt_86NVXXfhrrpKWJmyRQPh-QEEfUzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
